title: Krosno Water Juice Gin Tumbler Drinking Glasses | Set of 6 | 430 ML | Avant-Garde Collection | Whiskey Glasses Gift Set Tumblers Cocktail Set | Durable Glass | Home & Bar | Glass Cups Glassware
features: DURABLE GLASS – The set of glasses is not only very durable and resistant to mechanical damage, but also beautifully presented. The set can be washed in a dishwasher.
SET OF 6 GLASSES – Water, drinks and other cold drinks served in our low glasses will not only gain elegance, they will also perfectly decorate any table regardless of the tableware.

MODERN SHAPE – A wider, stable bottom tapering upwards with a reinforced edge will appeal to lovers of minimalism and stylish forms. Glasses have been designed so that they can look great in both classic and modern interiors.

TOTAL CAPACITY 430 ML - The transparent glass has a total capacity of 430 ml and a usable capacity of 430 ml, a height of 100 mm and a diameter of 90 mm. It is ideal not only for festivities, but also for everyday rituals.

EUROPEAN GLASS MANUFACTURER – Krosno is a renowned European glass manufacturer specializing in creating beautiful glass products for homes around the world. Our glass is of exceptional quality and made by carefully trained craftsmen who are devoted to their work. Thanks to this, each glass has a unique sense of belonging - regardless of the occasion.
description: Product Description Avant Garde Collection The Avant-garde line is characterized by elegance and unique style. It combines interesting design and functionality, and the unique shape of the bowl makes it stand out from the entire range. Glass from this collection is ideally suited to the products served, thanks to which it allows you to properly celebrate their tasting. Capacity: 380 ML Total Capacity: 430 ML Height: 100 mm Diameter: 90 mm PREMIUM DURABLE GLASS 100 years of craftsmanship in Krosno ensures precision in every detail, making our glass sound, clear and exuding brilliance. The glasses are lead-free, impact-resistant and retain their pristine condition even after many wash cycles, making them ideal for everyday use. What is the total capacity and what is the usable capacity? The usable capacity of the product is 380 ml, while the total capacity is 430 ml. Can these products be used in the freezer, microwave, or oven? The products are not intended for use in freezers, microwaves, or ovens. How should the glass be used? It should be used at room temperature and not heated above 60°C. Do not expose the glassware to temperature differences exceeding 35°C by rapid heating or cooling. Can the product be washed in a dishwasher? Yes, but wash at 55–60°C and rinse at max 65°C. Too high or low temperatures may cause cracking, poor cleaning, or damage to the glass and decoration. Avoid cold water rinsing.
